title: eriastrum ertterae
intro: Eriastrum ertterae, also known as Ertter's buckwheat or Ertter's lupine, is a rare species of flowering plant in the borage family that is native to California in the United States. It has been used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Eriastrum ertterae include reducing inflammation, relieving symptoms of colds and flu, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Eriastrum ertterae can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to promote overall health and well-being.
